{
  "rules": [
    {
      "parameter": "misc.pressure_test_type",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "hydrostatic",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Hydrostatic test with clean water at 1.5 times the maximum working pressure, held for not less than 2 hours with no visible leakage and no pressure drop."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "misc.test_medium",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "clean water",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Hydrostatic test with clean water at 1.5 times the maximum working pressure, held for not less than 2 hours with no visible leakage and no pressure drop."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "misc.test_pressure_multiplier",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": 1.5,
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Hydrostatic test with clean water at 1.5 times the maximum working pressure, held for not less than 2 hours with no visible leakage and no pressure drop."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "misc.hold_time_hours",
      "operator": ">=",
      "value": 2,
      "unit": "hours",
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Hydrostatic test with clean water at 1.5 times the maximum working pressure, held for not less than 2 hours with no visible leakage and no pressure drop."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "misc.visible_leakage",
      "operator": "absent",

      "quote": "Hydrostatic test with clean water at 1.5 times the maximum working pressure, held for not less than 2 hours with no visible leakage and no pressure drop."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "misc.pressure_drop",
      "operator": "absent",
      "value": null,
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Hydrostatic test with clean water at 1.5 times the maximum working pressure, held for not less than 2 hours with no visible leakage and no pressure drop."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "misc.pneumatic_test",
      "operator": "absent",
      "value": null,
      "unit": null,
      "condition": "chilled-water piping",
      "quote": "Pneumatic testing of chilled-water piping is not permitted."
    }
  ]
}
